cooperation_model.summary: Platform may use creator likeness to produce at least one AI-generated work with no fewer than ten episodes.

image_authorization.summary: Authorization is limited to specific AI works and does not authorize general-purpose AI model training.

term.summary: Standard contract term is July 1, 2026 to July 1, 2028; renewal by written supplementary agreement.

script_review.summary: Creator may review script/final work for image protection concerns and submit comments within three business days.

promotion.summary: Creator must publish no fewer than five promotional contents for the same project.

tracking_link.summary: Official tracking link should be placed within three business days after release and remain accessible for at least 60 consecutive days.

fixed_fee_payment.summary: Fixed fee is paid in two installments after specified milestones.

first_payment.summary: First payment due within 10 business days after agreement signing, script confirmation, required materials provision, and production commencement.

second_payment.summary: Second payment due within 10 business days after official online release and verification.

currency.summary: Settlement currency is USD; other currency uses payment-date exchange rate and cross-border processing fees may apply.

sales_verification.summary: Creator may request sales data and net revenue verification once every two months.

ip_ownership.summary: All results and works are owned exclusively by Party A.

confidentiality.summary: Creator must keep project materials, contract content, compensation and business information confidential.
